title: Associate Manager, Finance and Operations
matched_skills: Business/Management degree (Master in Management & Entrepreneurship at Leuphana)
Reporting experience (C-suite reporting, KPI reporting, programme status tracking)
missing_skills: Verhandlungssicheres Deutsch — candidate holds only German B1, which falls below the business-level fluency required
core_responsibilities: Processing financial transactions in day-to-day accounting (Finanzbuchhaltung)
Preparing outgoing payments via online banking and daily bank statement reconciliation
Supporting Senior Manager in reporting, month-end and year-end close; deputising after onboarding
Supporting HR and office management functions
recommended_emphasis: Highlight the Management degree as meeting the educational requirement
Emphasise any reporting or data-tracking experience as adjacent to finance reporting support
Acknowledge German B1 transparently; note active improvement if applicable
Frame cross-functional coordination and operational support experience as transferable to a generalist Ops role
Note the fixed-term/maternity-cover nature of the role — lower competition may offset the skill gap
summary: This is a weak match (38.2). The role is a specialist finance/accounting position requiring hands-on Finanzbuchhaltung, Rechnungswesen, and business-level German (verhandlungssicher), none of which align with the candidate's PMO, programme governance, and marketing-operations background. The candidate's Management degree and English fluency satisfy two of five required criteria, and their reporting experience covers one bonus item. The critical gaps are the absence of accounting/bookkeeping skills and insufficient German proficiency (B1 vs. required business-level). If the candidate wishes to apply, the application should clearly address the language gap and reframe operational coordination experience toward the generalist office/ops aspects of the role. This position is likely not a priority target.
